source_name_source_document_title: 2025 Drinking Water Quality Report – Portland Water Bureau
proportion_of_current_demand_source_docu: Derived: 1,060 MG groundwater produced in 2024 (239 MG maintenance Aug 1-20 + 821 MG supply augmentation Oct 10-Nov 6) divided by 34,675 MG annual system total (95 MGD x 365 days). withdrawal_location_name: Columbia South Shore Well Field (25 active wells in three aquifers, located between Portland International Airport and Blue Lake Park)
